Corrected total_population from 26800 to 16440 to align with 2020 Census data for Tract 6.04. The original value was a massive overestimation. The census count was likely affected by students leaving campus due to the COVID-19 pandemic. Recalculated population_density.
Population projected to rebound post-pandemic as students return to campus. Original projection was too high, adjusted to a more realistic recovery curve.
